Actions.ExploreDesc: Move cautiously into an adjacent, unexplored room or explore the current room.
Actions.TraverseDesc: Move to any previously explored room or to the dungeon entrance.
Actions.InteractDesc: Engage with a complex feature of the current room.
Actions.SearchDesc: Linger in an explored room to investigate it further.
Actions.HideDesc: Wait in silent darkness for the dungeon to become still.
Actions.VandalizeDesc: Break open a locked door, chest, or other property.
Actions.PickLockDesc: Attempt to pick a locked door or chest.
Actions.ConverseDesc: Spend a few minutes talking to a creature.
Actions.MomentsRestDesc: Pause for 10 minutes to recover and eat.
Actions.IncantDesc: Cast an incantation while the party keeps watch.

Sparks.CannyDesc: Opposes Costly. The party uses resources efficiently.
Sparks.QuickDesc: Opposes Slow. The party moves or acts with great speed.
Sparks.QuietDesc: Opposes Loud. The party remains silent and stealthy.
Sparks.SafeDesc: Opposes Harmful. The party avoids physical danger.
Sparks.StrikingDesc: Opposes Daunting. The party makes a bold impression.

Shadows.CostlyDesc: Opposes Canny. Resources are wasted or expensive.
Shadows.SlowDesc: Opposes Quick. Progress is sluggish or delayed.
Shadows.LoudDesc: Opposes Quiet. Noise attracts unwanted attention.
Shadows.HarmfulDesc: Opposes Safe. The party suffers physical harm.
Shadows.DauntingDesc: Opposes Striking. The atmosphere is oppressive or morale-draining.

Approach.AmbushDesc: Launch a surprise attack from a position of advantage.
Approach.FightDesc: Engage in direct combat with the encounter.
Approach.GreetDesc: Attempt a peaceful introduction or parley.
Approach.WarnDesc: Signal your presence or give a stern warning.
Approach.WithdrawDesc: Attempt to leave the encounter without further interaction.

Actions.AdvanceDesc: Break camp and continue traveling. Gain 6 travel points to spend on hex movement.
Actions.CampDesc: Set up camp and perform camp activities. Each party member chooses one camp activity.
Actions.NightsRestDesc: Rest for the night to recover. Must eat a ration. Triggers a hostility check.

Camp.AssistDesc: You forgo performing your own camp activity to help an ally with their own. Describe what you do to help your ally. If their activity requires a skill check, they gain one additional spark on a success.
Camp.CampAlchemyDesc: Spend 2 ingredients. On a failure, they are wasted. On a success, create a random lesser concoction. On a spark, choose what to create.
Camp.CookDesc: Spend 1 ingredient. On a failure, the ingredient is wasted. On a success, create a fine ration.
Camp.CraftDesc: Spend material (1 for tools, hands used for weapons, armor rating for armor). On a failure, materials are wasted. On a success, create crude equipment. On a spark, create fine equipment.
Camp.ForageDesc: On a success, gain one ingredient, plus one per spark.
Camp.FishDesc: On a success, gain one crude ration.
Camp.HuntDesc: On a success, gain one crude ration, plus one per spark. On a failure, lose 1 endurance.
Camp.LiftSpiritsDesc: Choose one ally, describe what you do to lift their spirits. On a success, remove a plight from one ally or grant them 1 resolve. For each spark, grant this effect to an additional ally.
Camp.PrepareTorchesDesc: Spend 1 material. On a success, create three crude torches, plus one per spark.
Camp.PursueDesc: You pursue a different task not covered by the other camp activities. The target number may vary depending on the task at hand.
Camp.RestEarlyDesc: You must eat a ration. Afterward, you gain all the benefits of a night's rest, and you can keep watch without penalty.
Camp.SalvageDesc: On a success, gain one material, plus one per spark.
Camp.ScoutDesc: On a success, choose one benefit: Party ignores mixed/rough terrain, Party has no risk of getting lost, or Party gains a +2 bonus to camp activity skill checks. On a failure, lose 1 endurance.
Camp.SurveyDesc: On a success, discover all points of interest in the current hex and any adjacent hexes. Weather may limit your ability to survey.
